mission.title: woodpecker-ci: Add support for nonroot OCI images
mission.description: Add support for nonroot OCI images. Requested by 18+ users.

steps.title: Check current woodpecker-ci deployment
steps.description:
Verify your woodpecker-ci version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n woodpecker-ci -l app.kubernetes.io/name=woodpecker-ci
helm list -n woodpecker-ci 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working woodpecker-ci installation.

steps.title: Review woodpecker-ci configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant woodpecker-ci configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n woodpecker-ci -l app.kubernetes.io/name=woodpecker-ci
kubectl get configmap -n woodpecker-ci -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=woodpecker-ci
```
### Clear and concise description of the problem

I want to build my software using pipelines that use nonroot images, as my builds do not require root.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Add support for nonroot OCI images
steps.description:
Setting `workingDir` to `workspaceBase`, i.e. `/woodpecker`, and creating `<workspaceBase>/src/<repo slug>` via the container user solves this. The subsequently created dir is then owned by the container user and all operations work.
To achieve this, `workspaceBase` has been added to the `Step`
```yaml
run-as: [uid]
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n woodpecker-ci -l app.kubernetes.io/name=woodpecker-ci
kubectl get events -n woodpecker-ci --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Add support for nonroot OCI images" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Setting `workingDir` to `workspaceBase`, i.e. `/woodpecker`, and creating `<workspaceBase>/src/<repo slug>` via the container user solves this. The subsequently created dir is then owned by the container user and all operations work.
To achieve this, `workspaceBase` has been added to the `Step` struct and set as `workingDir` during pod creation.
codeSnippets:
when:
  event:
    - push

skip_clone: true

steps:
  test:
    image: renovate/renovate
    commands:
      - whoami
      - pwd
      - echo $HOME
      - ls -la /woodpecker
      - echo $CI_WORKSPACE
      - ls -la $CI_WORKSPACE
      - mkdir /woodpecker/test
      - ls -la /woodpecker/test

+ whoami
ubuntu
+ pwd
/woodpecker/src/<redacted>/$CI_REPO
+ echo $HOME
/home/ubuntu
+ ls -la /woodpecker
total 24
drwxrwsr-x. 4 root   ubuntu  4096 Oct  2 08:31 .
drwxr-xr-x. 1 root   root      26 Oct  2 08:31 ..
drwxrws---. 2 root   ubuntu 16384 Oct  2 08:31 lost+found
drwxr-sr-x. 3 ubuntu ubuntu  4096 Oct  2 08:31 src
+ echo $CI_WORKSPACE
/woodpecker/src/<redacted>/$CI_REPO
+ ls -la $CI_WORKSPACE
total 8
drwxr-sr-x. 2 ubuntu ubuntu 4096 Oct  2 08:31 .
drwxr-sr-x. 3 ubuntu ubuntu 4096 Oct  2 08:31 ..
+ mkdir /woodpecker/test
+ ls -la /woodpecker/test
total 8
drwxr-sr-x. 2 ubuntu ubuntu 4096 Oct  2 08:31 .
drwxrwsr-x. 5 root   ubuntu 4096 Oct  2 08:31 ..

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with woodpecker-ci installed or the issue environment reproducible.
